page_content:
ENEE498 Topics in Electrical Engineering (1-3 Credits)

Selected topics of current importance in electrical engineering. Prerequisite: Permission of ENGR-Electrical & Computer Engineering department; and completion of all lower-division technical courses in the EE curriculum.

Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Electrical program.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
